name: accint
description: Local Work Model MCP server for agent work that learns from real outcomes.
long_description: AccInt exposes a local Work Model to MCP clients. Agents use acc_retrieve to read the scored substrate and acc_act to solve, execute bounded local work, register reusable runtimes, and close outcomes. The database stays on the user's machine; this bundle ships the local acc binary only — no acc.db substrate. It is standalone: on first use it creates the substrate automatically at the configured path and downloads the embedding model (several GB, one-time), with no separate installer. The memory starts empty and compounds from your own work.

tools.name: acc_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve scored Work Model context by late interaction.

query.description: Text query to retrieve relevant scored Work Model context.

image.description: Local image path or data URI for cross-modal retrieval.

tools.name: acc_act
tools.description: Run a Work Model action such as solve, continue, exec, register, or outcome.

runtime.description: Runtime to execute, such as solve, continue, outcome, exec, register, browser, or a registered runtime name.

input.description: Action input. For JSON-shaped actions, pass a JSON string.

db_path.title: AccInt database
db_path.description: Path to the local AccInt SQLite substrate (acc.db). Created automatically on first run if it doesn't exist — the default is fine for most users; no installer required.
